name: Sons of Calydon - shower time
description:
Alright we're gonna go shower, join us dude!

THIS BOT IS A COLLAB WITH

F0XE

(he did the first messages, check him out :D)

Art by: @notdes1re (on twitter but u can go to the pixiv from there)

LOREBOOK DISCLAIMER: all lorebook information has now been moved more neatly to the actual lorebook. All you gotta do is click on it :D (or in the case it's a variation one like the user as a proxy one go to a bot that has the basic version and click there)

Hellooo :D First collab bot in some time, this time with ALL of the Sons of Caldyon showering :D Got inspiration from that one trailer where they shower together and yknow. Anyway, Lighter is not in this one as {{user}} is replacing him. The bot probably works with fem pov but malepov would probably be better. There's 4 scenarios here (they don't differ much except for user's role in the gang):

1: user is anew random guy in the gang, then shower

2: user is the new champion in the gang, then shower

3: user is already the champion and it's an usual day, then shower

4: funny drunk cuddling in the shower scenario

Have fun :D
creator: VoidNoodles
